tasks.subject: Task 1: parseMusicNote 순수 파서 + deriveName
tasks.description:
**Goal:** PMNode doc → MusicNote(감지·플레이리스트·flatQueue) 변환 순수 함수 + URL→표시명 헬퍼.

**Files:**
- Create: app/src/lib/music/parseMusicNote.ts
- Test: app/tests/unit/music/parseMusicNote.test.ts

**Verify:** cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/parseMusicNote.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/music/parseMusicNote.ts", "app/tests/unit/music/parseMusicNote.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/parseMusicNote.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["음악:: 감지+name", "헤더 바로 다음 리스트만 트랙", "패턴 A/B + url 마크", "flatQueue 평탄화 + liPos", "deriveName"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: musicPlayer 전역 rune 스토어
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 큐·현재곡·재생상태 + play/toggle/next/prev/seek/report 액션 스토어.

**Files:**
- Create: app/src/lib/music/musicPlayer.svelte.ts
- Test: app/tests/unit/music/musicPlayer.test.ts

**Verify:** cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/musicPlayer.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/music/musicPlayer.svelte.ts", "app/tests/unit/music/musicPlayer.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/musicPlayer.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["setQueue 보존/리셋", "play/toggle", "next 끝 정지/prev seek0", "reportEnded/requestSeek"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: musicNotePlugin 데코레이션 + extension
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 재생중 마커 + Ctrl 게이트 트랙 버튼 ProseMirror 플러그인 + extension.

**Files:**
- Create: app/src/lib/editor/musicNote/musicNotePlugin.ts
- Create: app/src/lib/editor/musicNote/index.ts
- Test: app/tests/unit/music/musicNotePlugin.test.ts

**Verify:** cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/musicNotePlugin.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/musicNote/musicNotePlugin.ts", "app/src/lib/editor/musicNote/index.ts", "app/tests/unit/music/musicNotePlugin.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/musicNotePlugin.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["idle 0 데코", "재생중 node+eq", "ctrl on 트랙당 버튼 + onPlay", "비음악 null"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: MusicPlayerBar.svelte 컨트롤 패널 + audio
tasks.description:
**Goal:** sticky 컨트롤 패널 + 숨은 <audio> + 스토어 동기화 + 데코 갱신 nudge.

**Files:**
- Create: app/src/lib/editor/musicNote/MusicPlayerBar.svelte

**Verify:** cd app && npm run check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/musicNote/MusicPlayerBar.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["재파싱→setQueue", "audio 동기화", "media report/error→next", "데코 nudge", "check 통과"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: TomboyEditor extension 등록 + 데코 CSS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** tomboyMusicNote extension 등록 + 데코 클래스 전역 CSS.

**Files:**
- Modify: app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte

**Verify:** cd app && npm run check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["extension 등록", "music 데코 CSS + eq 애니", "check 통과"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: /note/[id] + NoteWindow 에 MusicPlayerBar 마운트
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 음악 노트일 때 MusicPlayerBar 마운트 + isMusicNoteDoc 게이트 플래그.

**Files:**
- Modify: app/src/routes/note/[id]/+page.svelte
- Modify: app/src/lib/desktop/NoteWindow.svelte

**Verify:** cd app && npm run check; npm run dev 수동 시나리오

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/routes/note/[id]/+page.svelte", "app/src/lib/desktop/NoteWindow.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["route 바+재생/마커/Ctrl", "NoteWindow 동일", "비음악 미마운트", "check 통과"]}
```
